INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,248 is pushing above its recent range — a move that only matters if it holds. 10Y yield at 4.42% is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. Oil at $102 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from oil. Confidence sits at 58/100 — enough for a directional lean but not a high-conviction call.
